offer: For restaurant general managers processing 10-20 invoices/month, inaccurate food cost tracking causes overspending. We provide automated food cost analysis instead of manual spreadsheets and calculations.
problem: Inaccurate food cost tracking leads to overspending.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for restaurant managers
Indie Hackers discussions on food cost issues
DM outreach with demo to restaurant managers
Engage in community forums for restaurant managers
try_it: Let users try manual entry of food costs on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with the one-liner and CTA
Produce a short demo video of the workflow
Offer early-access onboarding for initial users
Share weekly updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Enable CSV import for existing data
